ideation: This animation sequence depicts a stylized dance move, emphasizing the joyful and energetic nature of the 🕺 emoji.  The robot will use exaggerated movements to convey a sense of fun and rhythm.  The arms will move independently to create a dynamic and engaging sequence. The robot's lack of elbows will be compensated for by fluid joint movements and wrist rotations.  The sequence begins with a relaxed pose, transitions to an arm-raising pose, then a hip-swinging pose, before returning to a slightly different relaxed pose.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, ready to groove
both arms swing up and out with a flourish
arms pump down and in, a hip-swaying beat
arms return to a relaxed, cool stance
